title: picea abies var. clanbrassiliana
intro: Picea abies var. clanbrassiliana, also known as Irish or Clanbrassil fir, is a variety of the European spruce tree (Picea abies) native to Ireland. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Picea abies var. clanbrassiliana include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds, among other benefits. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
